programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Aunt Clara summons the greatest of them all -- Leonard Da Vinci -- to paint the Stephens' house.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora drinks a love potion intended for Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha takes revenge when Darrin's ex-fiancée upstages her.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora returns Darrin to his bachelor days to prove he would have been happy if he had never met Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Serena, Samantha's double, is arrested at a love-in and gets her picture in the paper.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha conjures up Prince Charming, who disrupts Samantha's dinner party.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha persuades a ghost to leave an old English castle and he decides to haunt the Stephens instead.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: A synthetic lawn sets off fights all over the Stephens' neighborhood.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: To Twitch Or Not To Twitch
programme.desc: Darrin and Samantha argue about witchcraft again.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha turns a bullying brat into a bulldog.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha's witchcraft, a ouija board and a ghost help Larry keep a client.
Mayhem and murder plague 227 when a mysterious man with a knife rents an apartment in Mary's building.

When Mary and Lester go to the reading of his uncle's will, they are both surprised to learn they have distant cousins whom they've never met, and even more confused when they discover they are a different color.
When Lester's old high school sweetheart comes to the neighborhood in search of a new home, Mary fears that she'll try to move in on more than just her turf.
Suffering from a very cold winter spell, the residents of "227" invade Mary and Lester's apartment, which is one of two apartments with heat.
When Mary and Lester's school teacher friend Mitchell meets Sandra, he sets out to win her pampered heart, no matter how many gifts or expensive dates it takes.
After a whirlwind courtship, Sandra accepts Mitchell's wedding proposal, making a commitment to trade in her glamorous life for what she not-so-long-ago considered a boring existence.
When Pearl finds out that Calvin is failing his history class, Mary, Rose and Lester each take turns as tutor-in-residence.

Though Brenda's but a week away from her sixteenth birthday, a milestone marking newfound dating freedom, Mary refuses to bend the rules and allow her to accept Calvin's invitation to the party of the year.
When Brenda's grandfather gives her his treasured collector's blues recording, she accidentally scratches the record and learns first-hand what the blues are all about.
When Mary and Lester assume the role of temporary foster parents, they're horrified to find Sandra's erotic lifestyle rubbing off on the impressionable co-ed.
When Mary's best high school chum, a successful television psychologist, pays her a visit, Mary feels somewhat inadequate when compared with her celebrity friend.
The tenants are thrilled when Rose hires a live-in handyman for some much needed repairs, only to find he's handier with the violin than the toolbox.
Mary has a terrible time trying to be polite to Fox, who is rude and obnoxious yet potentially important to Lester's financial future.
When Mary and Rose win the services of a butler in the church raffle, they look forward to the pampered life until they meet the pain-in-the-neck hired help.
Mary may be faced with eviction when 227's stingy landlord dies, and her nemesis Sandra is in line to inherit the building.

programme.sub-title: A Daughter Is A Precious Thing
programme.desc: When Mary can't solve daughter Brenda's boy problems, Brenda enlists the aid of an expert -- Mary's nemesis, Sandra, their sultry, sexy and "man-wise" neighbor.

programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards, WHIPLASH tells the story of an ambitious student drummer (Miles Teller) and his ruthless teacher (J.K. Simmons) who will stop at nothing to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Deep-sea divers vie with a Haitian drug dealer to recover a trunkload of sunken morphine. Based on Peter Benchley's best-selling novel.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3 (2009)
programme.desc: In The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3, Denzel Washington stars as New York City subway dispatcher Walter Garber, whose ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train.

programme.title: Battlefield Earth
programme.desc: Humanity is enslaved by gold-thirsty tyrants, whose 'man-animals' are about to ignite a rebellion.

programme.title: Second In Command
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL tries to stop an army of well-armed insurgents from killing their country's president, who's taken refuge within the American embassy.

programme.title: Kill 'Em All
programme.desc: When a mysterious stranger arrives at a local hospital on the brink of death, an FBI interrogation unlocks an international plot of revenge.

programme.title: Hancock
programme.desc: There are heroes--there are superheroes--and then there's Hancock. With great power comes great responsibility--everyone knows that--everyone, that is, but Hancock. Edgy, conflicted, sarcastic, and misunderstood, Hancock's well-intentioned heroics might get the job done and save countless lives, but always seem to leave jaw-dropping damage in their wake. The public has finally had enough--as grateful as they are to have their local hero, the good citizens of Los Angeles are wondering what they ever did to deserve this guy. Hancock isn't the kind of man who cares what other people think--until the day that he saves the life of PR executive Ray Embrey, and the sardonic superhero begins to realize that he may have a vulnerable side after all. Facing that will be Hancock's greatest challenge yet--and a task that may prove impossible as Ray's wife, Mary, insists that he's a lost cause.

programme.title: Battlefield Earth
programme.desc: Humanity is enslaved by gold-thirsty tyrants, whose 'man-animals' are about to ignite a rebellion.

Hancock isn't the kind of man who cares what other people think--until the day that he saves the life of PR executive Ray Embrey, and the sardonic superhero begins to realize that he may have a vulnerable side after all. Facing that will be Hancock's greatest challenge yet--and a task that may prove impossible as Ray's wife, Mary, insists that he's a lost cause.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: Ivanhoe (1982)
programme.desc: Sir Walter Scott's epic novel of timeless romance and knightly daring comes to life! The year is 1194. At long last, the noble knight Wilfred of Ivanhoe (Anthony Andrews) has returned from the Crusades to regain his title and win the hand of his beloved Lady Rowena (Lysette Anthony).

programme.title: All The Money in The World
programme.desc: After the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III, in a race against time, his mother works to convince his wealthy grandfather to pay the ransom. Inspired by historical events. Certain scenes, characters and dialogue have been fictionalized for dramatic purposes.

programme.title: Flatliners (1990)
programme.desc: Kiefer Sutherland and Julia Roberts lead a talented group of medical students on a dangerous journey to the other side of death... and back.

programme.title: Searching (2018)
programme.desc: 37 hours after David Kim's (John Cho) 16-year-old daughter goes missing without a single lead, David decides to search the one place no one has looked yet, where all secrets are kept today: his daughter's laptop.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro (2005)
programme.desc: A threat to California's pending statehood causes Alejandro de la Vega to take action.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Eight Millimeter
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage is a private detective hired to investigate the source of a crudely shot eight millimeter film. The investigation sends him down a gritty and frightening path into society's darkest corners.

programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: Accompanied by her husband, son and daughter, Adelaide Wilson returns to the beachfront home where she grew up as a child. Haunted by a traumatic experience from the past, Adelaide grows increasingly concerned that something bad is going to happen. Her worst fears soon become a reality when four masked strangers descend upon the house, forcing the Wilsons into a fight for survival. When the masks come off, the family is horrified to learn that each attacker takes the appearance of one of them.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman answers a cryptic ad for a housekeeping job at a luxurious yet foreboding New York City high-rise. Upon arrival, she discovers residents have vanished without a trace for decades, fueling whispers of a satanic cult lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Previously thought to be extinct, a massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific. With time running out, a visionary oceanographer recruits rescue diver Jonas Taylor to save the crew and the sea itself from an unimaginable threat -- a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the Megalodon.

programme.title: Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2
programme.desc: As it follows the twisted path traveled by five people fixated on "The Blair Witch Project," "Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2" journeys into a dark and dangerous place where the line between truth and fiction blurs and perhaps vanishes altogether. Individual perception grows increasingly untrustworthy as the film's protagonists find themselves caught in a vortex of unspeakable evil, the origins of which -- human or supernatural -- remain chillingly uncertain.

programme.title: Blair Witch
programme.desc: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: Parthenope
programme.desc: The beautiful Parthenope searches for love in the heady, hot summers and endless nights of her youth in Naples, Italy, as she falls for the city's many unforgettable characters and finds herself in the adventures that make up a lifetime.

programme.title: The Lobster
programme.desc: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

programme.title: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Ferdinand is a young bull who escapes from a training camp in rural Spain after his father never returns from a showdown with a matador. Adopted by a girl who lives on a farm, Ferdinand's peaceful existence comes crashing down when the authorities return him to his former captors. With help from a wisecracking goat and three hedgehogs, the giant but gentle bovine must find a way to break free before he squares off against El Primero, the famous bullfighter who never loses.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: While Lex Luthor plots to destroy him once and for all, the Man of Steel returns after a long absence to a much-changed world. Lois Lane has moved on with her life, and society has learned to survive without him. Superman must find a way to reconnect with her and find his place in a world that may no longer need him.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

programme.title: Portraits of a Lady
programme.desc: In October 2006, 25 artists come together to paint varied images of Justice Sandra Day O'Connor of the U.S. Supreme Court.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Tatiana Suarez
programme.desc: A chronicle of the MMA fighter Tatiana Suarez as she returns to the sport after an injury forced a four-year hiatus; Suarez reflects on her journey from wrestling prodigy to professional athlete in the UFC and the legacy she leaves young women.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Marty Supreme
programme.desc: Marty Mauser, a wily hustler with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: After meeting Frederick von Mierers, a guru who preaches New Age spirituality, the young Hoyt Richards adopts and spreads his teachings.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: As Frederick prepares for a coming global cataclysm, model Jacki Adams joins Eternal Values and exposes the group's true nature.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: The Curse of La Llorona
programme.desc: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: Insidious: The Red Door
programme.desc: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

programme.title: Faye
programme.desc: Hollywood legend Faye Dunaway candidly discusses the triumphs and challenges of her illustrious career. Through those reflections, she explores personal discoveries, including her struggles with mental health issues and bipolar disorder.

programme.title: Albert Brooks: Defending My Life
programme.desc: From stand-up routines to acting, writing and directing, Albert Brooks becomes a major force in American comedy. Includes testimonials from Larry David, Chris Rock, Sarah Silverman, Jonah Hill, Judd Apatow, Steven Spielberg, James L. Brooks and more.

programme.title: Miss You Can Do It
programme.desc: Abbey Curran, the first woman with cerebral palsy to compete in a Miss USA Pageant, creates a pageant specifically for girls with special needs.

programme.title: Smoking Tigers
programme.desc: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

programme.title: Deadpool 2
programme.desc: Wisecracking mercenary Deadpool meets Russell, an angry teenage mutant who lives at an orphanage. When Russell becomes the target of Cable -- a genetically enhanced soldier from the future -- Deadpool realizes that he'll need some help saving the boy from such a superior enemy. He soon joins forces with Bedlam, Shatterstar, Domino and other powerful mutants to protect young Russell from Cable and his advanced weaponry.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex

Plus, Tommy and Georgia celebrate their sixth anniversary and Georgia takes responsibility for planning the celebration.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Angie's anniversary party leaves the group at odds and causes Bronwyn to question who she should invite to Palm Springs, Justin and John work to resolve their issues, and Angie takes Heather to task for misrepresenting her comments about Lisa and betraying her trust - meanwhile, Meredith finds herself in conflict with Angie's husband Shawn over a podcast and reveals that she is facing challenges in her marriage with Seth, and things quickly go awry when Bronwyn invites Heather over to make amends.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Gina, Heather and Emily whisk Shannon away for a relaxing girls' trip in La Quinta, but Gina then finds herself in quite the mess with Emily and Heather - meanwhile, Tamra, Katie and Jenn head to Tamra's Big Bear house where they dip their toes in the snow and some pie, Katie shares with the ladies that she feels set up by Gina, and Alexis reveals that more trouble is heading Shannon's way.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Office manager and actor Maddy is given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five men behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Maddy will only be having dinner with three of them. She will choose her dates based on the menus she most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will she want to see for seconds?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster breathes his last surrounded by his wife Hermione, his daughter Rose, and Rose's partner Craig Coffley - Dr Isaac Vernon confirms the death as Gregory's son, Antarctic expedition leader Felix, arrives just too late to see his father. Undertakers Caleb Southwood and Ellie Loxley go to the body only to discover that it has gone missing - when the Barnabys and Betty see Nelson arrive with the news, Barnaby and Nelson find new pathologist Kam Karimore in place at Malton Hall and Nelson tells Barnaby that they have got off on the wrong foot. Concluding that the body was removed via the window, Barnaby and Nelson interview the family and learn that Felix plans to affect a quick sale while a visit from the Reverend Melissa Ackers shows bad blood between the family and the vicar - when the body of the Lancasters' ex-nanny is stolen from the graveyard, Barnaby and Nelson are drawn into a macabre world as they seek to identify the culprit.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. While a mysterious series of burglaries helps Mike to reunite an estranged family, Ventress tries to stop Greengrass's latest scam by arresting his dog.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The village of Blacktrees-on-Marsh has long been haunted by a Cold War prophecy, prompting a small group of locals to form Midsomer’s first doomsday prepper group. Founded two decades ago by the obsessive Warren Kaine, the group provides comfort to its paranoid members - until the morning Warren receives a hoax call that nuclear missiles have launched. Racing to his bombproof underground bunker, he radios the others to join him. But as dawn breaks over village green serenity rather than a scorched earth, Warren's resentful wife Clodagh arrives at the shelter to find him dead. Pathologist Fleur Perkins discovers Warren was suffocated after someone with technical skills tampered with the air filter. As DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter investigate, they must determine if someone was desperate to get their hands on the bunker, or if a killer is targeting the preppers. The pressure is on to catch the culprit before they strike again.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Ronnie and Matt are stumped when they investigate the murders of David and Elaine Lerner, who were stabbed to death as they slept. The Lerners seemed to have been universally loved, and there is not a single lead which points to grievances against them - were they really the intended victims? Soon the police realise that a much more likely target for attack is the previous owner of the house - Camilla Mallon, a banker embroiled in a hedge fund scandal. Could the murders be a case of mistaken identity? As crown prosecutors Jake Thorne and Alesha Phillips try to navigate a case in which the suspect has no apparent motive or intent to commit the crime, can they make a murder charge stick? Meanwhile, Jake's old mentor Margaret Rumsfield argues that the accused should only face manslaughter charges.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team investigate when mother and carer Lia Brown is killed by a stray bullet, and find themselves struggling to understand the involvement of 12 year old Kaden Blake in her death. Kaden is caught up in the local gang culture, and keeping silent is his only protection. DS Matt Devlin is drawn to this damaged boy, saddened to see a life so doomed by circumstance and furious that local dealer and gang leader Mark Ellis remains untouchable by the law. Matt forces the hands of the crown prosecutors to move Ellis into the frame for Lia's death, but the culture of intimidation and silence which rules gang life seems set to undo all of the team's good work. It is up to Kaden himself to find the courage to speak out - but when he does so, he sets in motion a shattering chain of events.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Forest ranger Felicity Ward is driving at night when she is blinded by a searing light from an unidentified flying object - the following morning sees her car found abandoned at the roadside. Barnaby is called to the crime scene where a black pod containing Felicity's body is discovered - meanwhile, the nearby village of Cooper Hill is buzzing with news of the UFO as hoteliers Victor and Nadine Campbell, their daughter Orla, tour operator Abigail Tonev and her garage-owning son Nathan rely on a stream of ufologists for their businesses. Barnaby and Nelson visit Felicity's mother Valerie and fiance Brogan and they reveal that Felicity was going to confront ufologist Carter Faulkner about an illegal campsite - as they dig deeper, Barnaby and Nelson unearth suspicions, betrayals, and long-buried secrets of a terrestrial nature in their search for the truth.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. When respected surgeon Dan Marsden is shot dead days before his retirement and his teenage daughters Mira and Karen are abducted, DCI Vera Stanhope, DS Joe Ashworth and DC Kenny Lockhart must race against time to track down the killer and save the sisters. As newcomer DC Barry Kelman joins the team, it is not long before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting outside the Old Bailey leaves one police officer dead and another wounded in what seems to be a targeted attack on a witness giving evidence in an attempted murder trial. However, as Ronnie and the team investigate, they are surprised to learn that the gunman was specifically targeting police officers because he believes that his family were the victims of a police cover-up. The case is a taxing one and leaves the whole team emotionally spent. Things get tougher when defence barrister Doug Greer argues that his client was the victim of institutional racism. Have the detectives gone too far in their mission to bring a cop-killer to justice? The trial is at risk of being derailed because of a failure to separate the personal from the professional - can senior crown prosecutors Jake and Alesha manage to convince the jury that the defendant is a murderer rather than a victim?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a robbery goes wrong, an innocent have-a-go hero is shot dead and the two thieves take a cab driver hostage as they make their getaway. The police manage to capture one of the suspects, Frank Donovan, and they are desperate to find out the whereabouts of his hostage, who has a potentially fatal medical condition. Donovan realises that his knowledge gives him leverage, and he offers the team a deal - he will tell them where the cab driver is in return for an immunity agreement. Ronnie and Sam have just ten hours to find the hostage before the CPS is forced to agree to Donovan's terms. Donovan's lawyer, the uncompromising Miriam Pescatore, drives a hard bargain and, with no physical evidence to connect Donovan to the crime scene, must Jake and Alesha watch a self-confessed killer walk free?

programme.title: Shetland
programme.desc: Murder mystery series. The shock discovery of Nikki's body intensifies the search for Zezi, Perez feels that time is slipping away, and Olivia tries to get information from Jamie. [S] S5 Ep5

programme.desc: Crime drama series. A cycle road race reaches its thrilling finale as Greg Eddon overtakes teammate Mitch McCordell to win, but Team DJM owner Des McCordell is annoyed that Greg disobeyed his team orders and rival team manager Reece Dexter is bitterly disappointed that his team lost. As Greg warms down, an unseen assailant throws him from his bike and moves in for the kill... When news comes of the murder, DS Nelson explains the situation to DCI Barnaby while race official Damien Lamerat and local organiser Mary Appleton offer their cooperation and Des outlines the stakes when he tells Barnaby that this race is a make-or-break event for the cyclists. As Barnaby and Nelson investigate, they find themselves drawn into a ruthlessly competitive world of blackmail, bribery and bloodshed where winning comes at any cost.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Challis Court appears to be a serene retirement community for former police officers, but decades-old resentments still fester beneath the surface. When a resident is found murdered inside the gated estate, DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter realise the killer is likely one of their own - an ex-cop. To crack the case, the duo must reopen the files on the legendary Goldman-Forbes heist from 30 years ago, a robbery that ruined reputations and left a long shadow. With several officers from the original investigation now living at Challis, Barnaby discovers that £300,000 remains motive enough for murder.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a petty criminal makes a deathbed confession about murdering a teenage girl, DS Ronnie Brooks has to re-open a 14-year-old case he was involved in during his drinking days. Now sober, Ronnie is shaken to the core when he has to revisit the case, which he thought he had put to bed a long time ago - not least when he is forced to question the conclusions he drew when his mind was clouded by alcohol. Did he make a serious error when he accused the girl's businessman father of her murder, or are the team wrong to believe the dying words of a drug addict? Ronnie finds himself torn between his former partner's unwavering belief that they got the right man and the mounting doubts of his current colleagues. He also begins to wonder if there may be other ghosts from his past addiction coming back to haunt him.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team starts to investigate after an elderly janitor is found murdered in his home, but the crime has been carried out with such precision and planning that the only evidence the killer leaves is designed to lead the detectives down a series of false trails. Could such masterminding be the work of someone not in control of their own actions? The defence argues that it could - but an altogether more sinister truth is uncovered by prosecutors Jake and Alesha.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Police drama series. A 20-year-old missing persons case is reopened when the remains of a teenage girl are finally found - with the mother desperate to discover the truth about her daughter's disappearance, Frost attempts to get to the bottom of a case that has spanned two decades.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: The very first episode of the classic detective series. New York police lieutenant James Dempsey kills his corrupt partner Joey and has to lay low until the case can be further investigated - his superior O'Grady sends Dempsey to London in England as part of an exchange of officers. Chief Superintendent Spikings, the head of SI-10, is not too pleased to have a Yank forced onto his department, so he decides to couple Dempsey with his complete opposite in the form of Sergeant Harriet 'Harry' Makepeace - an upper-class English rose - on a case involving a mysterious shipment of caviar.

programme.desc: Ali Hamidi and Bobby Zamora begin a bucket list fishing tour of Britain in Shropshire - their first mission is to catch a specimen crucian of over two pounds before they head to a top syndicate water called The Avenue, where the carp can weigh over an incredible 60 pounds. As they set themselves the crazy mission of both beating their current UK carp personal bests (PBs), Ali also calls in a favour from two Michelin-starred chef and carp angler Daniel Clifford to teach Zamo how to cook on the bank to stop him moaning...

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff hosts the classic darts-based game show as he is joined by three pairs of contestants each made up of a keen darts player (the 'thrower') and their partner (the 'knower') - the teams compete against each other by combining their skills at throwing darts at different game boards while answering questions correctly for points and prizes under the watchful eye of official scorer 'Little' Richard Ashdown. All the classic Bullseye rounds are back, including the Category Board, Pounds for Points and Bully's Prize Board, and the winning team will have a big decision to make at the end of the show - to risk everything they've won so far to try to win Bully's Mystery Star Prize. Also joining the fun is Queen of the Palace Fallon Sherrock, who partners with Freddie to try to complete a charity challenge.

programme.desc: Thad Beaumont (Timothy Hutton) has had success writing novels under both his real name and his pseudonym, George Stark, which he uses to publish base thrillers. When word gets out that they are one and the same, the author holds a mock funeral for Stark. But after a rash of murders eerily similar to those in the Stark books, Thad and his wife, Liz (Amy Madigan), realize that Stark is real and responsible, and must work with local Sheriff Pangborn (Michael Rooker) to stop him.

programme.title: Suburbicon
programme.desc: Suburbicon is a peaceful, idyllic, suburban community with affordable homes and manicured lawns -- the perfect place to raise a family, and in the summer of 1959, the Lodge family is doing just that. But the tranquil surface masks a disturbing reality, as husband and father Gardner Lodge must navigate the town's dark underbelly of betrayal, deceit and violence.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: Police chief Xavier Quinn (Denzel Washington) investigates the gruesome murder of Donald Pater, one of the wealthiest residents on a Caribbean island. He was found decapitated in his Jacuzzi. Although the local political establishment, especially crooked Governor Chalk (Norman Beaton), insists that small-time thief Maubee (Robert Townsend) is responsible, Xavier has his doubts. This view is complicated by the police chief's personal history with Maubee: The men have been friends since childhood.

programme.title: Igby Goes Down
programme.desc: Igby Slocumb (Kieran Culkin), a rebellious and sarcastic 17-year-old boy, is at war with the stifling world of old money privilege he was born into. With a schizophrenic father (Bill Pullman), a self-absorbed, distant mother (Susan Sarandon), and a shark-like young Republican big brother (Ryan Phillippe), Igby figures there must be a better life out there -- and sets about finding it.

programme.title: Ella Enchanted
programme.desc: As a baby, Ella (Anne Hathaway) receives a visit from Lucinda (Vivica A. Fox), her fairy godmother, and is bestowed with a magical talent that requires her to obey anything that she is told to do. This proves to be more of a curse than a blessing, particularly once her mother dies and she is forced to live with the cruel Dame Olga (Joanna Lumley). Eventually, Ella embarks on a journey to find Lucinda and break the spell, accompanied by the handsome Prince Charmont (Hugh Dancy).

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: A smart comedy about a day in the life of a barbershop on the south side of Chicago. Calvin (Ice Cube), who inherited the struggling business from his deceased father, views the shop as nothing but a burden and a waste of his time. After selling the shop to a local loan shark, Calvin slowly begins to see his father's vision and legacy and struggles with the notion that he just sold it out.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business
programme.desc: This sequel to the 2002 film returns to the Chicago barbershop owned by Calvin Palmer Jr. (Ice Cube). His employees -- Isaac (Troy Garity), Terri (Eve), Ricky (Michael Ealy), Dinka (Leonard Earl Howze) and Kenard -- have their own personal and workplace problems, and a new barbershop called Nappy Cutz has moved in across the street. As Calvin tries to change the character of his business, Nappy Cutz and gentrification become a threat to the surrounding community.

programme.title: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: To survive harsh economic times, Calvin and Angie have merged the barbershop and beauty salon into one business. The days of male bonding are gone as Eddie and the crew must now contend with sassy female co-workers and spirited clientele. As the battle of the sexes rages on, a different kind of conflict has taken over Chicago. Crime and gangs are on the rise, leaving Calvin worried about the fate of his son. Together, the friends come up with a bold plan to take back their beloved neighborhood.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love
programme.desc: "Shakespeare in Love" is a romantic comedy for the 1990s set in the 1590s. It imaginatively unfolds the witty, sexy and timeless tale behind the creation of the greatest love story ever told. A young Shakespeare is out of cash and ideas; he meets his ideal woman and she inspires him to write one of his most famous plays.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: Billy the Kid
programme.desc: The Lincoln County War is on the verge of kicking off in a big way; Billy has joined Englishman John Tunstall in his commercial battle with Major Murphy and the House, but even bigger players lurk in the background and the stakes are high.

programme.title: Billy the Kid
programme.desc: The war has started, but John Tunstall is hospitalized by a smallpox outbreak.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Ferris Bueller (Matthew Broderick) has an uncanny skill at cutting classes and getting away with it. Intending to make one last duck-out before graduation, Ferris calls in sick, "borrows" a Ferrari, and embarks on a one-day journey through the streets of Chicago. On Ferris' trail is high school principal Rooney (Jeffrey Jones), determined to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Election
programme.desc: Jim McAllister (Matthew Broderick), a well-liked high school government teacher, can't help but notice that successful student Tracy Flick (Reese Witherspoon) uses less than ethical tactics to get what she wants. When Tracy runs for school president, Jim feels that she will be a poor influence on the student body and convinces Paul, a dim-witted but popular student athlete, to run against Tracy. When she becomes aware of Jim's secret involvement in the race, a bitter feud is sparked.

programme.title: The Fire Inside
programme.desc: The story of Claressa "T-Rex" Shields, a boxer from Flint, Mich., who trained to become the first woman in her country's history to win an Olympic gold medal in the sport.

programme.title: The Count of Monte-Cristo
programme.desc: Edmond Dantes becomes the target of a sinister plot and is arrested on his wedding day for a crime he did not commit. After 14 years in the island prison of Château d'If, he manages a daring escape. Now rich beyond his dreams, he assumes the identity of the Count of Monte-Cristo and exacts his revenge on the three men who betrayed him.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
programme.desc: In the Southwest during the Civil War, a mysterious stranger, Joe (Clint Eastwood), and a Mexican outlaw, Tuco (Eli Wallach), form an uneasy partnership -- Joe turns in the bandit for the reward money, then rescues him just as he is being hanged. When Joe's shot at the noose goes awry during one escapade, a furious Tuco tries to have him murdered. The men re-team abruptly, however, to beat out a sadistic criminal and the Union army and find $20,000 that a soldier has buried in the desert.

programme.title: Narc
programme.desc: Tells the dark story of suspended undercover narcotics officer, Nick Tellis (Jason Patric), who is reluctantly drawn back onto the force to find the truth behind the murder of a young police officer killed in the line of duty. He is teamed with Henry Oak (Ray Liotta), the slain officer's partner, a rogue cop who will stop at nothing to avenge his friend's death. As Tellis and Oak unravel the case, the dark underbelly of the narcotics world reveals itself in surprising ways.

programme.title: Rescue Dawn
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Dieter Dengler (Christian Bale), a U.S. fighter pilot, is shot down over Laos and taken captive by enemy soldiers. Interned in a POW camp, Dengler and his fellow prisoners (Steve Zahn, Jeremy Davies) endure torture, hunger and illness while they await their chance to escape.

programme.title: Event Horizon
programme.desc: A spaceship missing for seven years finally re-emerges and sends out a distress signal. But when a team is sent out to investigate, they discover that something sinister has taken over the craft.

programme.title: Afterburn
programme.desc: After a massive solar flare destroys the Eastern Hemisphere, a treasure hunter for hire ventures to Europe to retrieve the coveted Mona Lisa, only to learn that the world needs a hero more than it needs a painting.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving the future lies buried in the secrets of the past and the hidden history of Transformers on Earth. Now, it's up to the unlikely alliance of inventor Cade Yeager, Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the world.

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: When astronauts blast off from the planet Mars, they leave behind Mark Watney, presumed dead after a fierce storm. With only a meager amount of supplies, the stranded visitor must utilize his wits and spirit to find a way to survive on the hostile planet. Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

programme.title: Annihilation
programme.desc: Lena, a biologist and former soldier, joins a mission to uncover what happened to her husband inside Area X -- a sinister and mysterious phenomenon that is expanding across the American coastline. Once inside, the expedition discovers a world of mutated landscapes and creatures, as dangerous as it is beautiful, that threatens both their lives and their sanity.

programme.title: Mercy
programme.desc: In the near future, an advanced AI judge tells a captive detective that he's on trial for the murder of his wife. If he fails to prove his innocence within 90 minutes, he'll be executed on the spot.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The residents of town stand at a crossroads unlike any they've faced before as Boyd sets a daring, and dangerous, plan in motion.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: Unhuman
programme.desc: Seven misfit students must band together against a growing gang of unhuman savages. Their trust in each other gets tested to the limit in a brutal, horrifying fight to survive as they take down the murderous zombie creatures.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After hired hand Tom Chaney (Jeff Corey) murders the father of 14-year-old Mattie Ross (Kim Darby), she seeks vengeance and hires U.S. Marshal Rooster Cogburn (John Wayne), a man of true grit, to track Chaney into Indian territory. As the two begin their pursuit, a Texas Ranger, La Boeuf (Glen Campbell), joins the manhunt in hopes of capturing Chaney for the murder of a Texas senator and collecting a substantial reward. The three clash on their quest of bringing to justice the same man.

programme.title: The Greatest Show on Earth
programme.desc: The Greatest Show on Earth is a dazzling spectacle of life behind the scenes with Ringling Bros.-Barnum and Bailey Circus, the best three-ring circus in the land. Celebrates the extravagant three-ring circus and depicts the passionate scenes of love and jealousy behind the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: Rescue Dawn
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Dieter Dengler (Christian Bale), a U.S. fighter pilot, is shot down over Laos and taken captive by enemy soldiers. Interned in a POW camp, Dengler and his fellow prisoners (Steve Zahn, Jeremy Davies) endure torture, hunger and illness while they await their chance to escape.

programme.title: F/X
programme.desc: Rollie Tyler (Bryan Brown) is a special-effects expert for low-budget Hollywood movies. As gangster Nicholas DeFranco (Jerry Orbach) prepares to testify in court against his former bosses, FBI agents, fearing Nicholas will be killed by the mob before he can take the stand, decide to fake his assassination. The agents hire Rollie to use his special-effects skills to make the murder look believable. Leo McCarthy (Brian Dennehy), a detective, steps in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: FX2
programme.desc: Former movie special effects expert Rollie Tyler (Bryan Brown) has now become a maker of elaborate toys. When a police officer asks him to use his special effects skills to help catch an elusive killer, he teams up with old friend and private investigator Leo McCarthy (Brian Dennehy). Using a combination of old-fashioned detective work and movie magic, the two uncover a plot involving stolen gold and corrupt cops, while evading a mysterious assassin.

programme.title: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: Frank Morrison (John Travolta) no longer lives with his ex-wife, Susan (Teri Polo), and 12-year-old son, Danny (Matt O'Leary). Susan and Danny now live with Rick Barnes (Vince Vaughn), Susan's new husband. Danny, who has a reputation for telling lies, has accused his stepfather of committing a murder. But Frank is the only one who believes him. Now the father Danny trusts must protect him from the stepfather he fears.

programme.title: Changing Lanes
programme.desc: A rush-hour fender-bender on New York City's crowded FDR Drive, under most circumstances, wouldn't set off a chain reaction that could decimate two people's lives. But on this day, at this time, a minor collision will turn two complete strangers into vicious adversaries. Their means of destroying each other might be different, but their goals, ultimately, will be the same: Each will systematically try to dismantle the other's life in a reckless effort to reclaim something he has lost.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The residents of town stand at a crossroads unlike any they've faced before as Boyd sets a daring, and dangerous, plan in motion.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: Rudy
programme.desc: Rudy Ruettiger (Sean Astin) wants to play football at the University of Notre Dame, but has neither the money for tuition nor the grades to qualify for a scholarship. Rudy redoubles his efforts to get out of the steel mill where his father works when his best friend (Christopher Reed) dies in an accident there. Overcoming his dyslexia thanks to his friend and tutor, D-Bob (Jon Favreau), Rudy gains admission to Notre Dame and begins to fight his way onto the school's fabled football team.

programme.title: Eight Men Out
programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox, who are set to play the Cincinnati Reds in the World Series of 1919, are at odds with their team's owner, Charles Comiskey, who pays his players unsatisfactory wages despite the team's popularity. A group of professional gamblers offers the Sox's best athletes a fortune to throw the series, and the players agree. However, their reputations and careers are ruined when the dark secret, dubbed the Black Sox Scandal, reaches the public consciousness.

programme.title: Narc
programme.desc: Tells the dark story of suspended undercover narcotics officer, Nick Tellis (Jason Patric), who is reluctantly drawn back onto the force to find the truth behind the murder of a young police officer killed in the line of duty. He is teamed with Henry Oak (Ray Liotta), the slain officer's partner, a rogue cop who will stop at nothing to avenge his friend's death. As Tellis and Oak unravel the case, the dark underbelly of the narcotics world reveals itself in surprising ways.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: Run the Tide
programme.desc: When his drug-addicted mother leaves prison, a man (Taylor Lautner) kidnaps his younger brother (Nico Christou) and flees to the California coast for a better life.

programme.title: When Worlds Collide
programme.desc: After Dr. Bronson (Hayden Rorke) discovers Zyra, a new planet, fellow astronomer Dr. Hendron (Larry Keating) checks Bronson's data and reaches the horrifying conclusion that Bellus, a star in Zyra's orbit, is doomed to crash into the Earth within a matter of months. Meanwhile, Hendron's daughter, Joyce (Barbara Rush), has grown fond of pilot David Randall (Richard Derr), and pleads to have him brought along as a small group is relocated to Zyra to avoid the impending mass destruction.

programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
programme.desc: Questions arise when Senator Stoddard (James Stewart) attends the funeral of a local man named Tom Doniphon (John Wayne) in a small Western town. Flashing back, we learn Doniphon saved Stoddard, then a lawyer, when he was roughed up by a crew of outlaws terrorizing the town, led by Liberty Valance (Lee Marvin). As the territory's safety hung in the balance, Doniphon and Stoddard, two of the only people standing up to him, proved to be very important, but different, foes to Valance.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: Following the conflicts in Iraq and Afghanistan, injured veterans turn to adaptive athletics to heal their physical and emotional battle wounds.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: A turf battle between New York City street gangs that rages from Coney Island to the Bronx. The Warriors are mistakenly fingered for the killing of a gang leader. Soon they have every gang in the city out to get revenge, and they must make their way across the city to their own turf.

programme.title: The Heartbreak Kid
programme.desc: After a short fling with a beautiful woman named Lila (Malin Akerman) and at the urging of his friends and family, Eddie (Ben Stiller) proposes marriage. But Eddie didn't realize that Lila is a shrew, and she reveals her true nature during their honeymoon. He then meets Miranda (Michelle Monaghan) and is convinced she is his soul mate. Eddie sets out to woo Miranda and extricate himself from his wife's claws.

programme.title: Bandits
programme.desc: Joe (Bruce Willis) and Terry (Billy Bob Thornton) have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new -- and somewhat legitimate -- life south of the border. Unfortunately, things get more complicated when they meet Kate Wheeler (Cate Blanchett), who runs into Terry with her car. Kate joins the bandits on their cross-country spree, and eventually she steals something, too: their hearts.

programme.title: Walking Tall
programme.desc: When decorated military officer Chris Vaughn returns to his hometown in the state of Washington to find work, he finds that the lumber mill has closed and the town's big business is now a seedy casino operated by one of his old schoolmates, Jay Hamilton. Aided by his loyal friend Ray Templeton, Vaughn tries to make a stand against the area's crime and corruption, but, finding no help from the police, he must take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair
programme.desc: Bored billionaire Thomas Crown (Pierce Brosnan) decides to entertain himself by stealing a Monet from a reputed museum. When Catherine Banning (Rene Russo), an investigator for the museum's insurance company, takes an interest in Crown, a complicated back-and-forth game with romantic undertones begins between them. In an attempt to find out where Banning's loyalties lie, Crown returns the painting and essentially turns himself in, hoping that Banning's feelings for him will lead to an escape.

programme.title: Paycheck
programme.desc: Michael Jennings is a top-notch reverse engineer. Corporations pay him to crack the secrets of their competitors' products. When the job is done, he has his memory of it erased. Rethrick, head of a company called Allcom, hires Jennings to reverse-engineer a secret government device. After the job, Jennings wakes from the memory erasure to find himself being chased by various agencies. He soon realizes that the fate of the entire world may be in his hands.

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: In the fast-paced world of NASCAR, a rivalry brews between rookie hotshot Cole Trickle (Tom Cruise) and veteran racer Rowdy Burns (Michael Rooker). When both of them are seriously injured in competition, the former bitter rivals become close friends. With Cole's spirits restored by a romance with neurosurgeon Dr. Claire Lewicki (Nicole Kidman), and Rowdy still sidelined by injuries, Cole decides to race Rowdy's car in the Daytona 500 against underhanded newcomer Russ Wheeler (Cary Elwes).

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

A man loses his identity while living under a repressive regime. In a story based on George Orwell's classic novel, Winston Smith (John Hurt) is a government employee whose job involves the rewriting of history in a manner that casts his fictional country's leaders in a charitable light. His trysts with Julia (Suzanna Hamilton) provide his only measure of enjoyment, but lawmakers frown on the relationship -- and in this closely monitored society, there is no escape from Big Brother.

programme.title: Two Rode Together
programme.desc: For a fee, hard-drinking Texas marshal Guthrie McCabe (James Stewart) agrees to help Army officer Jim Gary (Richard Widmark) search for a group of whites who were abducted years earlier by Comanche warriors. After rescuing two of the abductees, McCabe and Gary find that the former captives have fully adopted the culture of their American Indian captors and are barely recognizable. Cultures collide as they attempt to return the settlers to their original -- and now long-forgotten -- lives.

programme.title: Cold Mountain
programme.desc: In this classic story of love and devotion set against the backdrop of the American Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier named W.P. Inman (Jude Law) deserts his unit and travels across the South, aiming to return to his young wife, Ada (Nicole Kidman), who he left behind to tend their farm. As Inman makes his perilous journey home, Ada struggles to keep their home intact with the assistance of Ruby (Renée Zellweger), a mysterious drifter sent to help her by a kindly neighbor.

programme.title: Carrie
programme.desc: In this chilling adaptation of Stephen King's horror novel, withdrawn and sensitive teen Carrie White (Sissy Spacek) faces taunting from classmates at school and abuse from her fanatically pious mother (Piper Laurie) at home. When strange occurrences start happening around Carrie, she begins to suspect that she has supernatural powers. Invited to the prom by the empathetic Tommy Ross (William Katt), Carrie tries to let her guard down, but things eventually take a dark and violent turn.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
programme.desc: Hoping to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs, SpongeBob follows a mysterious, swashbuckling ghost pirate known as the Flying Dutchman on a seafaring adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the ocean.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: The Ladies Man
programme.desc: After being ejected from his job for one too many vulgar and inappropriate comments, Leon (Tim Meadows) unsuccessfully seeks employment from every radio station in Chicago. He receives a mysterious letter from his true love asking him to return to her -- he just has to figure out who it is!

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: When their string magnate father, Rudolf Smuntz, dies, brothers Ernie (Nathan Lane) and Lars (Lee Evans) move into his decrepit mansion. Struggling to keep a promise to never sell the now unprofitable string factory, the brothers decide that restoring the house, the last built by a famous architect, could bring them a great deal of money. But during their restoration attempts, Ernie and Lars are continually frustrated by a malicious mouse that keeps destroying their efforts.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes
programme.desc: When Gnomeo and Juliet first arrive in London with their friends and family, their biggest concern is getting a new garden ready for spring. When everyone in the garden suddenly goes missing -- there's only one gnome to call -- Sherlock Gnomes. The famous detective and sworn protector of the city shows up with his sidekick Watson to investigate the case. The mystery soon leads the gnomes on a rollicking adventure as they meet all-new ornaments and explore an undiscovered side of London.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything they've faced before. With their abilities outmatched in every way, they seek out an unlikely alliance to stop Shadow and protect the planet.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: Straight-arrow policewoman Cooper (Reese Witherspoon) is excited and thrilled about her next assignment. Her task is to escort Daniella Riva (Sofía Vergara), a wisecracking Colombian beauty, from San Antonio to Dallas so both she and her husband can testify against a drug lord. Plans go awry when Mr. Riva gets ambushed, leaving Daniella a widow. Cooper and her witness must now use their wits to escape from crooked cops and murderous gunmen, while not killing each other in the process.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: The Bradys of the popular '70s sitcom get thrust into the '90s, with a whole new set of problems. The family's house is in danger of being taken away by developer Larry Dittmeyer if the ever-positive brood can't come up with $20,000. Parents Mike and Carol initially don't fret, until Mike has difficulty getting any of his architectural designs sold. Fearing the worst, the six Brady kids decide to enter a talent contest and raise the money themselves.

programme.title: Airplane!
programme.desc: This spoof comedy takes shots at the slew of disaster movies that were released in the 70s. When the passengers and crew of a jet are incapacitated due to food poisoning, a rogue pilot with a drinking problem must cooperate with his ex-girlfriend turned stewardess to bring the plane to a safe landing.

programme.title: Killer Klowns From Outer Space
programme.desc: When teenagers Mike (Grant Cramer) and Debbie (Suzanne Snyder) see a comet crash outside their sleepy small town, they investigate and discover a pack of murderous aliens who look very much like circus clowns. They try to warn the local authorities, but everyone assumes their story is a prank. Meanwhile, the clowns set about harvesting and eating as many people as they can. It's not until they kidnap Debbie that Mike decides it's up to him to stop the clowns' bloody rampage.

programme.title: The French Lieutenant's Woman
programme.desc: In this story-within-a-story, Anna (Meryl Streep) is an actress starring opposite Mike (Jeremy Irons) in a period piece about the forbidden love between their respective characters, Sarah and Charles. Both actors are involved in serious relationships, but the passionate nature of the script leads to an off-camera love affair as well. While attempting to maintain their composure and professionalism, Anna and Mike struggle to come to terms with their infidelity.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes
programme.desc: When Gnomeo and Juliet first arrive in London with their friends and family, their biggest concern is getting a new garden ready for spring. When everyone in the garden suddenly goes missing -- there's only one gnome to call -- Sherlock Gnomes. The famous detective and sworn protector of the city shows up with his sidekick Watson to investigate the case. The mystery soon leads the gnomes on a rollicking adventure as they meet all-new ornaments and explore an undiscovered side of London.

programme.title: Throw Momma From the Train
programme.desc: Larry (Billy Crystal), an author with a cruel ex-wife, Margaret (Kate Mulgrew), teaches a writing workshop where Owen (Danny DeVito), one of his students, is fed up with his domineering mother (Anne Ramsey). When Owen watches a Hitchcock classic that seems to mirror his own life, he decides to put the movie's plot into action and offers to kill Margaret, if Larry promises to murder his mom. Before Larry gets a chance to react to the plan, it seems that Owen has already sealed Margaret's fate.

programme.title: Candyman: Farewell to the Flesh
programme.desc: As her brother stands trial for the killing of an outspoken New Orleans professor, inner-city schoolteacher Annie Tarrant begins hearing rumors of the Candyman, a murderous, knife-handed figure of urban legend. Skeptical of the Candyman's existence, Annie follows the procedure for summoning him and suddenly finds herself celebrating the most horrifying Mardi Gras of her life. Meanwhile, Annie's mother harbors a dark family secret.

programme.title: Carrie
programme.desc: In this chilling adaptation of Stephen King's horror novel, withdrawn and sensitive teen Carrie White (Sissy Spacek) faces taunting from classmates at school and abuse from her fanatically pious mother (Piper Laurie) at home. When strange occurrences start happening around Carrie, she begins to suspect that she has supernatural powers. Invited to the prom by the empathetic Tommy Ross (William Katt), Carrie tries to let her guard down, but things eventually take a dark and violent turn.

programme.title: Poltergeist II: The Other Side
programme.desc: The Freelings have escaped their haunted house, which is now being studied by paranormal investigators, including shaman Taylor (Will Sampson). When Taylor realizes that the Beast, masquerading as the Rev. Kane (Julian Beck), knows where young Carol Anne Freeling (Heather O'Rourke) now lives, he goes to warn the family that their daughter is in danger again. To protect Carol, her father, Steve (Craig T. Nelson), and the rest of the family must plot to take down the Beast.

programme.title: Poltergeist III
programme.desc: Psychically attuned youngster Carol Anne (Heather O'Rourke) is sent to live in Chicago with her Uncle Bruce (Tom Skerritt) and Aunt Pat (Nancy Allen). But that doesn't mean that she's escaped the apparitions that have haunted her in the past. When she starts experiencing terrifying visions, her school psychologist believes that they're figments of her imagination. But this becomes hard to believe when ghostly foes start inhabiting the mirrors in her relatives' high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: Doctor Louis Creed (Dale Midkiff) moves his family to Maine, where he meets a friendly local named Jud Crandall (Fred Gwynne). After the Creeds' cat is accidentally killed, Crandall advises Louis to bury it in the ground near the old pet cemetery. The cat returns to life, its personality changed for the worse. When Louis' son, Gage (Miko Hughes), dies tragically, Louis decides to bury the boy's body in the same ground despite the warnings of Crandall and Louis' visions of a deceased patient.

programme.title: Species
programme.desc: When government scientist Xavier Fitch (Ben Kingsley) intercepts a space transmission containing the genetic sequence for an alien life form, he uses it to produce "Sil" (Natasha Henstridge) -- a gorgeous alien-human hybrid. As Fitch's team grows concerned at her rapid rate of growth, Sil wrecks the laboratory and begins a violent quest for a suitable male human to impregnate her. The U.S. government dispatches top assassin Preston Lennox (Michael Madsen) and a team of experts to stop her.

programme.title: The Pink Panther
programme.desc: When the coach of a French soccer team is killed, his ring featuring the legendary Pink Panther diamond goes missing. Luckily, Chief Inspector Dreyfus (Kevin Kline) has a plan: assign his most intelligent, most driven officers to track down the thieves in secret, while publicly assigning the bumbling Inspector Jacques Clouseau (Steve Martin) as head of the case. Clouseau seems hopeless, until his various mistakes and misjudgments miraculously put him on the real killer's trail.

programme.title: The Pink Panther 2
programme.desc: When the world's greatest treasures, including the Pink Panther diamond, are stolen, only one man can solve the mystery: Clouseau (Steve Martin). Together with his partner Ponton (Jean Reno) and a team of international detectives, the bumbling detective must catch the thief and retrieve the artifacts -- without causing too much collateral damage.

programme.title: RoboCop
programme.desc: In a violent, near-apocalyptic Detroit, evil corporation Omni Consumer Products wins a contract from the city government to privatize the police force. To test their crime-eradicating cyborgs, the company leads street cop Alex Murphy (Peter Weller) into an armed confrontation with crime lord Boddicker (Kurtwood Smith) so they can use his body to support their untested RoboCop prototype. But when RoboCop learns of the company's nefarious plans, he turns on his masters.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a not-too-distant dystopian future, when man's most precious resource -- oil -- has been depleted and the world plunged into war, famine and financial chaos, the last vestiges of the law in Australia attempt to restrain a vicious biker gang. Max (Mel Gibson), an officer with the Main Force Patrol, launches a personal vendetta against the gang when his wife (Joanne Samuel) and son are hunted down and murdered, leaving him with nothing but the instincts for survival and retribution.

programme.desc: In a violent, near-apocalyptic Detroit, evil corporation Omni Consumer Products wins a contract from the city government to privatize the police force.
