programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don and the agency are up for an award for their Glo Coat ad; Roger reflects on how he first met Don.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: An impending deadline leaves the firm in disarray; Don makes Peggy stay late to work on a Samsonite ad, missing a birthday dinner with her boyfriend, Mark.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don attempts to regain control over his life through physical changes and journal writing; Don's persistence with Faye results in an impromptu dinner date.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Peggy is forced to face some unpleasant facts about a client's discriminatory business practices; Don and Faye's burgeoning relationship is tested when Sally runs away from home and turns up at the office.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Joan finds out she's pregnant with Roger's child and goes to have an abortion; Lane's father is displeased when Lane expresses his feelings for an African-American waitress at the local Playboy Club.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: When word leaks of Lucky Strike's defection to BBDO, the employees of SCDP scramble to hold onto the rest of their accounts.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don incenses the other partners when he runs a full-page ad declaring that his firm will no longer represent tobacco companies.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Surprising opportunity arises for both Don and Peggy, leaving them with some pretty big decisions to make.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Neurosurgeon Rowan Fielding has a problem -- when she gets mad, she kills with her mind; her search for answers sends her toward her secretive biological family; in New Orleans, Deirdre Mayfair is desperate to escape from her aunt's oppressive house.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Wracked with grief over Ellie's death, Rowan is out of control and unfit to perform surgeries; her paranoia that someone is following her is proven true; in New Orleans, Deirdre and her mysterious companion Lasher work together to draw Rowan home.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Deirdre's grisly death, Rowan searches for safety in a strange city; Sip provides Rowan with a safe house while he investigates Deirdre's murder; Lasher makes contact with Rowan, but not in the way one might expect.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: At Deirdre's funeral, Rowan is plunged into the world of the infamous Mayfair family; Uncle Cortland and Aunt Carlotta present diverging views on Lasher; Rowan must choose whom to trust and face the dire consequences; Sip identifies Deirdre's killer.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Trapped in the First Street House, Rowan and Sip must confront its many mysteries in order to escape; Rowan grapples with an inconceivable offer; Sip's sister Odette makes a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Desperate to relinquish Lasher, Rowan reaches out to her extended Mayfair family for help; Rowan must trust their unique process, a sacred ritual; Sip's search for answers takes him back to the Talamasca.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan makes a shocking discovery but has to deal with it alone; a tragic event brings Rowan closer to the Mayfairs -- and Lasher; Sip falls deeper down the rabbit hole of the key necklace.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan inadvertently discovers her role in a prophecy that's held the Mayfair family for generations; Sip's investigation reaches its conclusion, uncovering secrets that could tarnish both Rowan's family and his role in the Talamasca.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: Living in 1910 New Orleans as his family's executor-in-charge, Louis's life begins to unravel in otherworldly ways when he meets Lestat, a vampire; in 2020, Louis tells his story to journalist Molloy.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire

programme.desc: A model who unwittingly became a jewel smuggler's (Cameron Mitchell) pawn is killed; guest Jo Ann Pflug.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: DeSoto and Gage deliver a baby over the father's protests; DeSoto worries about a dinner he is planning for the station-house crew.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A canyon fire threatens the residents of a housing development and keeps the paramedics on round-the-clock duty; guest Tony Dow.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: DeSoto and Gage talk down an airplane flown by a teenage boy whose father, the pilot, suffered a heart attack while at the controls.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The paramedics hold a demonstration for student nurses, one of whom interests Gage; the hospital staff saves a robber and his victim.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage resents media attention given to a paramedic (Gary Crosby) from another squad; Brackett clashes with a tycoon over a diagnosis.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The paramedics and hospital staff deal with a stubborn elderly woman (Jeanette Nolan), a parachutist in a tree and other odd cases.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage and DeSoto rescue an elderly couple from an elevator crash; Brackett berates a forgetful student nurse; a girl irritates Gage.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage begins to think a television police show is real; the emergency team at Rampart Hospital treats a doctor for radiation poisoning.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage and DeSoto rescue a family from the wreck of a private airplane; Early and McCall treat a 4-year-old boy who has swallowed pills.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The rest of the team is caught while Murdock flies a girl to freedom from a religious paramilitary cult; guest John Saxon.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A boy (Meeno Peluce) whose brother (William Smith) has been unlawfully imprisoned asks his friend B.A. for help; guest Ken Norton.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team investigates when a SWAT officer suspects his squad of crimes; guests Jack Ging, Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The A-Team helps a small-town sheriff fend off a vengeful motorcycle gang. With George Peppard, Dirk Benedict, Mr. T, Dwight Schultz.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a gambler leads to a mobster (Charles Cioffi) and then to a $100,000 price on Hannibal's head.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An explosion kills an executive as he calls his wife from a car phone, and suspicion falls on a company attorney.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo excavates the area surrounding the newly poured foundation of a building to search for a corpse.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A botanical collector involves his nephew in a kidnapping to break a trust fund, then murders him to finance his hobby.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The mistress of a conductor becomes a target for murder after threatening to tell all to her lover's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A football-team manager (Robert Culp) establishes an electronic alibi for the murder of the team owner (Dean Stockwell) during a game; guests Valerie Harper, Susan Howard, James Gregory, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo journeys to London to observe Scotland Yard, but winds up investigating murders committed by two Shakespearean actors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The ongoing feud between an out-of-favor Hollywood actress and a gossip columnist results in murder. Guest star: Anne Baxter.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A surgeon kills a nurse who suspects him of intentionally botching the heart surgery of his colleague, a cardiac expert.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An American chess champion plays a private match with his challenger and kills him because the man is a better player.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Twins (Martin Landau in a dual role) kill their wealthy uncle just before his marriage to a younger woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cosmetics manufacturer is suspected of murdering an employee (Martin Sheen) who stole a wrinkle-removing formula.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A wine connoisseur kills his playboy brother to prevent his selling the family winery to expiate his latest scandal.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A senatorial candidate exploits death threats, fabricated for publicity, to kill his manager.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A motivational researcher blackmails to further his career, kills a man, then frames the victim's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An enraged publisher hires a gunman to kill an author who intends to sign a contract with a competitor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A prodigy and his robot help investigate the murder of a professor who threatened to disgrace a colleague's scientist son.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A gospel singer kills his evangelist wife when she denies him more money and threatens blackmail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A man murders his wife and has a friend cover up the act with a burglary, only to have the friend blackmail him into doing the same favor in return.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo keeps a close watch on a physical-fitness fanatic suspected of murdering his business partner.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A prominent photographer hatches a scheme to cover up his wife's murder with a phony kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A military-academy commandant murders to protect his career and prevent his school's conversion to a coed junior college.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo's Mexico cruise is disrupted when an automobile executive kills his blackmailing lover, the ship's singer, then frames a musician.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: After killing his mother-in-law, an electronics magnate's alibi is a video security system.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A psychiatrist (George Hamilton) romances a wealthy patient (Lesley Ann Warren) then uses her in his alibi after killing her husband (Stephen Elliott).

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired actress/dancer stages her wealthy husband's suicide after he refuses to finance her Broadway comeback.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A foreign dignitary murders his rival then disguises the crime as part of a robbery blamed on college protesters.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cunning advertising consultant leading a double life as a spy tries to cover up the details of a homicide.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired bullfighter credited with saving a young man from a bull arranges the death of the boy's father to protect his own reputation.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A magician claims an airtight alibi -- being sealed in a tank of water -- in the murder of a blackmailing associate.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo's prime suspect in the case of a drowned yacht magnate also turns up dead.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An egotistic TV detective matches wits with Columbo after murdering his producer, a former lover and current blackmailer.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The curator (Joyce Van Patten) of a strapped family-owned museum stages a robbery, for insurance, then murders to hide her crime; guests Celeste Holm, Tim O'Connor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An accountant, embezzling to support his wife's lifestyle, murders his partner after the man discovers his crimes.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A mystery writer uses her plot as a guide to murder her nephew, whom she blames for her niece's death.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: Old archaeologist (Dick Foran) recalls mummy (Lon Chaney) at large in New England.

programme.title: Night Creatures
programme.desc: Pirate Captain Clegg (Peter Cushing), an English vicar by day, leads ghostly mounted smugglers by night.

programme.title: Night Monster
programme.desc: A man (Lionel Atwill) uses mind over matter to replace his legs, then hunts the doctors who took them.

programme.title: The Night Walker
programme.desc: A lawyer (Robert Taylor) advises a blind man's rich widow (Barbara Stanwyck) tormented by nightmares.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.","large":"When young Fool (Brandon Adams) breaks into the home of his family's greedy and uncaring landlords, he discovers a disturbing scenario where incestuous adult siblings have mutilated a number of boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs in their large, creepy house. As Fool attempts to flee before the psychopaths can catch him, he meets their daughter, Alice (A.J. Langer), who has been spared any extreme discipline by her deranged parents. Can Fool and Alice escape before it's too late?

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Claude Rains) rises from the Paris sewers to boost his favorite opera understudy's (Susanna Foster) career.","large":"Talented Christine (Susanna Foster) is unaware that her singing lessons are being funded by a secret admirer, Enrique (Claude Rains), a mysterious violinist with a disfigured face. Christine's colleagues become suspicious when mysterious accidents start occurring at the Paris Opera House, as the deaths coincide with her meteoric rise to stardom. Christine's suitors, Raoul (Edgar Barrier) and Anatole (Nelson Eddy), brave the dark recesses of the opera house to find the true culprit.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Herbert Lom) has his dwarf helper bring an opera singer (Heather Sears) to his London sewer hide-out.","large":"Composer Lord Ambrose D'Arcy (Michael Gough) and his backer, Harry Hunter (Edward De Souza), struggle to find a replacement for the female lead in their new opera after she quits in the wake of a gruesome murder. When a new prospect, the nubile Christine Charles (Heather Sears), disappears, Harry cautiously investigates. Meanwhile, a mysterious masked man (Herbert Lom) who is eerily familiar with the opera holds Christine captive and offers to groom her to play the part.

programme.title: Revenge of the Creature
programme.desc: Florida aquarium workers (John Agar, Lori Nelson, John Bromfield) communicate by cattle prod with a captured gill-man.

programme.title: She-Wolf of London
programme.desc: Grisly murders convince a turn-of-the-century Londoner that she is the latest in a long line of werewolves.

programme.title: Son of Dracula
programme.desc: Count Alucard (Lon Chaney) makes Southern belle (Louise Allbritton) his bride.

programme.title: Son of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron's son (Basil Rathbone) revives his father's monster (Boris Karloff) with help from a broken-necked shepherd called Ygor (Bela Lugosi).","large":"Baron Wolf von Frankenstein is determined to prove the legitimacy of his father's scientific work, thus rescuing the family name from disgrace. With the help of Ygor, a grave robber, Wolf successfully reanimates the monster his father originally brought back from the dead. But when several villagers are killed mysteriously, Wolf must find the culprit in order to vindicate his creation, or face the possibility that he may be responsible.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: A snake scientist (Strother Martin) turns his daughter's (Heather Menzies) boyfriend (Dirk Benedict), his lab helper, into a big cobra.","large":"Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notice curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: Tarantula
programme.desc: Desert scientists (John Agar, Mara Corday, Leo G. Carroll) try to stop a fortified spider the size of a building.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: An alien that can duplicate other life forms invades a polar research station in this remake of the 1951 classic "The Thing from Another World."","large":"In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp, and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot and the camp doctor lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: The Werewolf of London
programme.desc: An Asian werewolf (Warner Oland) bites a botanist (Henry Hull) in Tibet and rivals him for the antidote in London.","large":"While in Tibet researching a mysterious flower that purportedly takes its strength from the moon, botanist Wilfred Glendon is bitten by a strange creature. Back in London, Glendon becomes absorbed in his research of the plant, and is annoyed by the appearance of fellow scientist Dr. Yogami, who reveals that the plant is the only known temporary antidote for werewolves. Glendon remains skeptical until the next full moon, when he undergoes a startling transformation.

programme.title: The Wolf Man
programme.desc: Bitten by a werewolf, an aristocrat (Lon Chaney) grows fangs, fur and a muzzle, then begs his father (Claude Rains) for help.","large":"When his brother dies, Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney) returns to Wales and reconciles with his father (Claude Rains). While there, he visits an antique shop and, hoping to impress Gwen (Evelyn Ankers), the attractive shopkeeper, buys a silver walking cane. That same night he kills a wolf with it, only to later learn that he actually killed a man (Bela Lugosi). A gypsy (Maria Ouspenskaya) explains that it was her son, a werewolf, that he killed, and that Larry is now one himself.

programme.title: Altered
programme.desc: Fifteen years after they were abducted by aliens, four men get a chance to take revenge when they capture one of the creatures.","large":"Forever damaged by their stint as the scientific subjects of hostile alien creatures, a trio of alien-abduction survivors -- Otis (Michael C. Williams), Duke (Brad William Henke) and Cody (Paul McCarthy-Boyington) -- troll the wooded site of their disappearance, heavily armed, in search of their attackers. After wounding a violent alien in the woods, the three drag its dying body to the home of reclusive fellow abductee Wyatt (Adam Kaufman), barricade themselves in and prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When plans for a weekend vacation hit a dead end, friends find themselves stranded in unfamiliar territory, pursued by a bloodthirsty predator. Holed up in an isolated cabin, the friends must fight to survive as the body count rises.

programme.title: The Atticus Institute
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, Dr. Henry West creates an institute to find people with supernatural abilities. When Judith Winstead comes to the facility, she exhibits amazing abilities that the military wants to turn into a weapon.

programme.title: Beneath
programme.desc: Coal miners become trapped 600 feet below the surface. As the air grows toxic and time runs out, the crew descends into madness and turns on one another.

programme.title: The Birds II: Land's End
programme.desc: Killer birds infest a seaside town where parents (Brad Johnson, Chelsea Field) take their children for vacation.

programme.title: The Black Castle
programme.desc: An Englishman (Richard Greene) enters an Austrian nobleman's (Stephen McNally) castle, complete with torture chamber and alligator moat.

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Two brothers become entangled in a sinister Nazi's occult experiment at an American farmhouse.

programme.title: Captive Wild Woman
programme.desc: A mad doctor (John Carradine) turns an animal trainer's (Milburn Stone) ape into Paula the ape-woman (Acquanetta).

programme.title: Cherry Falls
programme.desc: A serial killer stalking virgins in a small Virginia town targets an idealistic teenager (Brittany Murphy).","large":"A small-town sheriff, Brent Marken (Michael Biehn), discovers the presence of a serial killer in his sleepy hamlet. Since the perpetrator has been targeting only virgins, both male and female, the deaths cause panic in much of the local high school population. Sheriff Marken's daughter, Jody (Brittany Murphy), is among the potential victims, since she has yet to sleep with her boyfriend, Kenny Ascott (Gabriel Mann). Can the lawman stop the killer before he goes after Jody?

programme.title: Cry Wolf
programme.desc: Mysterious murders occur when students (Lindy Booth, Julian Morris) at a prep school invent a story about a serial killer.

programme.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: A teenage girl under house arrest discovers that the nightmarish urban legend of the Mexican boogeyman, El Cucuy, is true.

programme.title: The Darkness
programme.desc: A supernatural force terrorizes a couple (Kevin Bacon, Radha Mitchell) and their two children after the young son brings home some mysterious rocks from the Grand Canyon.","large":"Peter Taylor (Kevin Bacon), his wife Bronny and their two children return to Los Angeles after a fun-filled vacation to the Grand Canyon. Strange events soon start to plague the family, including young son Michael's increasingly erratic behavior. The Taylors learn that Michael brought back some mysterious rocks that he discovered inside a cave. Unfortunately, something followed them home as the clan now find themselves in a battle with a supernatural force that preys on their worst fears.

programme.title: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: An all-female crew, on a boat in the middle of nowhere, must deal with an invader on their ship.

programme.title: Dead Man's Eyes
programme.desc: Blinded by acid thanks to his jealous model, an artist (Lon Chaney) needs eye tissue for an operation.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man inherits a haunted house after spending time in a mental institution.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: A mysterious masked killer terrorizes members of a family at a secluded estate.

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of her twin sister, a young American encounters the tormented spirits of Japan's mysterious and legendary Aokigahara Forest.","large":"When her twin sister disappears in Japan, a young American named Sara becomes determined to find out what happened to her. Sara's investigation leads her to the legendary Aokigahara Forest, located at the base of Mount Fuji. Accompanied by expatriate Aiden, she enters the mysterious wilderness after being warned to "stay on the path." Her investigation plunges her into a dark world where the angry and tormented souls of the dead prey on those who dare to explore the forest.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.","large":"Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.","large":"New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Yuppies (Dwier Brown, Carey Lowell) with a baby hire a nanny (Jenny Seagrove), a druid witch who sacrifices babies to a tree.","large":"Optimistic about their future, well-off parents Kate (Carey Lowell) and Phil (Dwier Brown) hire the pleasant and lovely young Camilla (Jenny Seagrove) to live with them and care for their new baby. Though Camilla seems like an answer to their prayers, she proves to be more than she appears, and a diabolical plot involving the wellbeing of their child is uncovered. The young parents are forced to fight supernatural forces for the life of their vulnerable offspring.

programme.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
programme.desc: A psychopathic hitchhiker (Jake Busey) terrorizes a man (C. Thomas Howell) and his girlfriend (Kari Wuhrer) as they take a road trip.","large":"Years after being traumatized by a hitchhiker, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) is trying to piece his life back together. After being suspended from the police force, he decides to return to Texas to speak with a friend about his problems. He reluctantly agrees to let his girlfriend, Maggie (Kari Wuhrer), join him. As they drive, Maggie lets a stranded driver (Jake Busey) into the car. Halsey becomes suspicious and kicks him out, but the stranger returns, undeterred, to wreak havoc.

programme.title: I Saw What You Did
programme.desc: Two teenage girls, bored while baby-sitting, make prank phone calls, completely unaware one of the people on the other end of the line has just killed his wife and now thinks the girls must be silenced.","large":"Kit (Sarah Lane) and her best friend, Libby (Andi Garrett), are two teenage girls bored while baby-sitting. To pass the time, they make prank phone calls, telling the person on the other end of the line, "I saw what you did, and I know who you are!" It's all in good fun, until they call a man (John Ireland) who just murdered his wife and buried her in the woods. Convinced they actually do know his secret, he becomes determined to find out who they are and silence them forever.

programme.title: Incarnate
programme.desc: Recruited by a Vatican emissary (Catalina Sandino Moreno), an exorcist (Aaron Eckhart) taps into the subconscious mind of a tormented boy (David Mazouz) to free him from demonic possession.","large":"After a single mother witnesses terrifying symptoms of demonic possession in her 11-year-old son (David Mazouz), a Vatican representative calls on wheelchair-bound scientist Dr. Seth Ember (Aaron Eckhart) to rid him of the evil spirit. Driven by a personal agenda rooted in his own tragic past, Ember enters the boy's unconscious mind where he confronts a demon as ferocious as it is ingenious.

programme.title: Karma
programme.desc: When recent college grad Manny has trouble making ends meet, his father-in-law offers him a job evicting delinquent tenants. Manny soon finds himself unleashing a karma demon which stalks him at every turn.

programme.title: The Keeping Hours
programme.desc: A lawyer sees the ghost of his dead son, which leads the man's estranged wife back into his life.

programme.title: BlacKkKlansman
programme.desc: Ron Stallworth, the first African-American police officer in Colorado Springs, Colo., works undercover to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan in 1979. Stallworth and his partner Flip Zimmerman risk their lives to penetrate the KKK at its highest levels.","large":"Ron Stallworth is the first African-American detective to serve in the Colorado Springs Police Department. Determined to make a name for himself, Stallworth bravely sets out on a dangerous mission: infiltrate and expose the Ku Klux Klan. The detective soon recruits a more seasoned colleague, Flip Zimmerman, into the undercover investigation of a lifetime. Together, they team up to take down the extremist hate group as the organization aims to sanitize its rhetoric to appeal to the mainstream.

programme.title: The Jacksons: An American Dream
programme.desc: The Gary, Ind., Jacksons guide Michael and their other children to show-business success; features 38 songs.

programme.title: The Jacksons: An American Dream
programme.desc: The Gary, Ind., Jacksons guide Michael and their other children to show-business success; features 38 songs.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: Dorothy tries to save her dog from a storm and eases on down the road to see the Wiz with Tin Man, Scarecrow and Cowardly Lion.","large":"When Harlem schoolteacher Dorothy tries to save her dog from a storm, she's miraculously whisked away to an urban fantasy land called Oz. After accidentally killing the Wicked Witch of the East upon her arrival, Dorothy is told about the Wiz, a wizard who can help her get back to Manhattan. As Dorothy goes in search of the Wiz, she's joined by the Scarecrow, the Tin Man and the Cowardly Lion.

programme.title: Cry Freedom
programme.desc: Set in apartheid-torn South Africa, Donald Woods is the editor of the East London Daily Express and Steve Biko is a young black leader struggling to improve life in the townships. The two form an unlikely friendship.","large":"Set in apartheid-torn South Africa. Donald Woods is the editor of the East London Daily Express and Steve Biko is a young black leader struggling to improve life in the townships. The two form an unlikely friendship but when Biko is taken into police custody and then murdered, Woods is placed under house arrest. Fearing for his family's safety, he decides to smuggle them over the border.

programme.title: Nurse Betty
programme.desc: After seeing her no-good husband killed by hit men (Morgan Freeman, Chris Rock), a woman (Renée Zellweger) thinks she is a nurse who must find her lover, a soap-opera doctor.","large":"What happens when a person decides that life is merely a state of mind? If you're Betty, a small-town waitress and soap opera fan from Fair Oaks, Kansas, you refuse to believe that you can't be with the love of your life just because he doesn't really exist. After all, life is no excuse for not living. Traumatized by a savage event, Betty enters into a fugue state that allows -- even encourages -- her to keep functioning... in a kind of alternate reality.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Overstressed New Yorkers (Paul Rudd, Jennifer Aniston) think they've found the answer to their problems when they join a counterculture community where the only rule is to be oneself.","large":"George (Paul Rudd) and Linda (Jennifer Aniston) have overextended, overstressed lives in Manhattan. After George loses his job, he and Linda have little choice but to move to Atlanta and stay with his terrible brother. On the way, the couple happen upon Elysium, an idyllic counterculture community, where money, careers and clothing are strictly optional. George and Linda think that they can make a fresh start in Elysium, only they may be trading one set of problems for another.

programme.title: Wet Hot American Summer
programme.desc: After their charges have left, staff members of a children's camp pursue romances that have been brewing all season.","large":"Set on the last day of camp, in the hot summer of 1981, "Wet Hot American Summer" follows a group of counselors who are each trying to complete their unfinished business before the day ends. The entire summer of pent-up sexual frustrations, unresolved post-traumatic stress, pending separations and of course, the talent show, all weigh heavily on the minds and groins of counselors and campers alike.

programme.title: The Wedding Date
programme.desc: A desperate woman (Debra Messing) pays a male escort (Dermot Mulroney) $6,000 to accompany her to London for her sister's wedding.","large":"With the wedding of her younger sister (Amy Adams) fast approaching, Kat Ellis (Debra Messing) faces the undesirable prospect of traveling alone to London for the ceremony. While this is bad enough, Jeffrey (Jeremy Sheffield), the man who left her as they moved closer to marriage, happens to be the groom's best man. Determined to show everyone -- most of all Jeffrey -- that her romantic life is as full and thrilling as ever, Kat hires a charming male escort (Dermot Mulroney) as her date.

programme.title: You, Me and Dupree
programme.desc: Three become a crowd when a newlywed (Matt Dillon) invites his jobless buddy (Owen Wilson) to temporarily move in with him and his wife (Kate Hudson).","large":"Newlyweds Carl (Matt Dillon) and Molly (Kate Hudson) are anxious to start their lives together, but the pair soon become a trio when Carl invites his jobless buddy Randy (Owen Wilson) to crash at their place until he gets back on his feet. At first, Carl is happy to have him around, but that soon turns to annoyance when Randy threatens to become a permanent fixture in their home.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: Career plans and other obstacles stand in the way of two lovers (Jason Segel, Emily Blunt) who run into trouble each time they try to set a wedding date.","large":"On their one-year anniversary, sous chef Tom Solomon (Jason Segel) plans to surprise his girlfriend, Violet Barnes (Emily Blunt), with an engagement ring. The lovers do end up engaged, but the fact that the proposal does not go exactly as planned proves to be a harbinger of things to come. Each time they try to set a date, various obstacles stand in their way. As more and more time passes, Tom and Violet begin to wonder if perhaps their marriage is not meant to be.

programme.title: Nurse Betty
programme.desc: After seeing her no-good husband killed by hit men (Morgan Freeman, Chris Rock), a woman (Renée Zellweger) thinks she is a nurse who must find her lover, a soap-opera doctor.","large":"What happens when a person decides that life is merely a state of mind? If you're Betty, a small-town waitress and soap opera fan from Fair Oaks, Kansas, you refuse to believe that you can't be with the love of your life just because he doesn't really exist. After all, life is no excuse for not living. Traumatized by a savage event, Betty enters into a fugue state that allows -- even encourages -- her to keep functioning... in a kind of alternate reality.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Overstressed New Yorkers (Paul Rudd, Jennifer Aniston) think they've found the answer to their problems when they join a counterculture community where the only rule is to be oneself.","large":"George (Paul Rudd) and Linda (Jennifer Aniston) have overextended, overstressed lives in Manhattan. After George loses his job, he and Linda have little choice but to move to Atlanta and stay with his terrible brother. On the way, the couple happen upon Elysium, an idyllic counterculture community, where money, careers and clothing are strictly optional. George and Linda think that they can make a fresh start in Elysium, only they may be trading one set of problems for another.

programme.title: Wet Hot American Summer
programme.desc: After their charges have left, staff members of a children's camp pursue romances that have been brewing all season.","large":"Set on the last day of camp, in the hot summer of 1981, "Wet Hot American Summer" follows a group of counselors who are each trying to complete their unfinished business before the day ends. The entire summer of pent-up sexual frustrations, unresolved post-traumatic stress, pending separations and of course, the talent show, all weigh heavily on the minds and groins of counselors and campers alike.

programme.title: The Wedding Date
programme.desc: A desperate woman (Debra Messing) pays a male escort (Dermot Mulroney) $6,000 to accompany her to London for her sister's wedding.","large":"With the wedding of her younger sister (Amy Adams) fast approaching, Kat Ellis (Debra Messing) faces the undesirable prospect of traveling alone to London for the ceremony. While this is bad enough, Jeffrey (Jeremy Sheffield), the man who left her as they moved closer to marriage, happens to be the groom's best man. Determined to show everyone -- most of all Jeffrey -- that her romantic life is as full and thrilling as ever, Kat hires a charming male escort (Dermot Mulroney) as her date.

programme.title: You, Me and Dupree
programme.desc: Three become a crowd when a newlywed (Matt Dillon) invites his jobless buddy (Owen Wilson) to temporarily move in with him and his wife (Kate Hudson).","large":"Newlyweds Carl (Matt Dillon) and Molly (Kate Hudson) are anxious to start their lives together, but the pair soon become a trio when Carl invites his jobless buddy Randy (Owen Wilson) to crash at their place until he gets back on his feet. At first, Carl is happy to have him around, but that soon turns to annoyance when Randy threatens to become a permanent fixture in their home.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: Career plans and other obstacles stand in the way of two lovers (Jason Segel, Emily Blunt) who run into trouble each time they try to set a wedding date.","large":"On their one-year anniversary, sous chef Tom Solomon (Jason Segel) plans to surprise his girlfriend, Violet Barnes (Emily Blunt), with an engagement ring. The lovers do end up engaged, but the fact that the proposal does not go exactly as planned proves to be a harbinger of things to come. Each time they try to set a date, various obstacles stand in their way. As more and more time passes, Tom and Violet begin to wonder if perhaps their marriage is not meant to be.

programme.title: 5 Flights Up
programme.desc: A husband (Morgan Freeman) and wife (Diane Keaton) spend a hectic weekend pondering the sale of the apartment they've shared for more than 40 years.

programme.title: The Caveman's Valentine
programme.desc: Disturbing images haunt a mentally ill homeless man as he attempts to pin a youth's murder on a celebrated photographer.","large":"Romulus is a homeless man who dwells in a cave in one of New York City's parks, but was once a promising composer. When a boy is discovered dead on Valentine's Day, everyone assumes he froze to death, but Romulus believes he was murdered by noted photographer David Leppenraub. He struggles to convince everyone, including his police officer daughter -- but, inspired by hallucinations of his late wife, he eventually gets his chance to crack the case himself.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Eva
programme.desc: In order to get a breather from their meddling sister-in-law (Gabrielle Union), three men pay a playboy (LL Cool J) $5,000 to romance her.","large":"Eva has been in charge of her younger sisters ever since their parents died, many years ago. Eva's uncanny ability to interfere in her sisters' affairs has not endeared her to their spouses and partners. The men would like to close out and divide up the family trust fund that Eva oversees. So they concoct a simple plan: compensate cash strapped ladies' man Ray Adams (LL Cool J) to romance and distract Eva from her familial duties. Sparks fly between Ray and Eva ... but the plan goes awry.

programme.title: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Long-forgotten rivalries and romances reignite when college friends (Morris Chestnut, Taye Diggs, Regina Hall) have a Christmas reunion nearly 15 years after the last time they saw one another.","large":"Nearly 15 years after they were last together as a group, college friends Lance (Morris Chestnut), Harper (Taye Diggs), Candace (Regina Hall), Quentin (Terrence Howard), Robyn (Sanaa Lathan), Jordan (Nia Long), Murch (Harold Perrineau), and Mia (Monica Calhoun) finally reunite over the Christmas holidays. Though much has changed in their lives, the friends discover just how easy it is for long-forgotten rivalries and passionate romances to be reignited.

programme.title: Something New
programme.desc: A Black woman raises eyebrows among her friends when she develops a budding romance with a white man.","large":"Career-minded Kenya McQueen is set up on a blind date with architect Brian Kelly, but backs out when she realizes that he is white. Impressed with his work on a friend's mansion, McQueen hires Kelly to design her new garden -- and he sweeps her off her feet. But, after her friends introduce her to executive Mark Harper, McQueen must choose between the type of man she always dreamed she wanted and giving in to life's little surprises.

programme.title: Little
programme.desc: Jordan is a take-no-prisoners mogul who torments her long-suffering assistant and employees on a daily basis. She soon faces an unexpected threat to her personal life and career when she magically transforms into a 13-year-old version of herself.","large":"Jordan is a take-no-prisoners tech mogul who torments her long-suffering assistant, April, and the rest of her employees on a daily basis. She soon faces an unexpected threat to her personal life and career when she magically transforms into a 13-year-old version of herself right before a do-or-die presentation. Jordan will now need to rely on April more than ever -- if April is willing to stop treating Jordan like a 13-year-old child who has an attitude problem.

programme.desc: A husband (Morgan Freeman) and wife (Diane Keaton) spend a hectic weekend pondering the sale of the apartment they've shared for more than 40 years.

She soon faces an unexpected threat to her personal life and career when she magically transforms into a 13-year-old version of herself.","large":"Jordan is a take-no-prisoners tech mogul who torments her long-suffering assistant, April, and the rest of her employees on a daily basis. She soon faces an unexpected threat to her personal life and career when she magically transforms into a 13-year-old version of herself right before a do-or-die presentation. Jordan will now need to rely on April more than ever -- if April is willing to stop treating Jordan like a 13-year-old child who has an attitude problem.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: A commander (Rhona Mitra) and her crew venture into long-quarantined Scotland to find the counteragent to a deadly virus that has re-emerged in London.","large":"When the first outbreak of the Reaper virus hit Scotland, Eden Sinclair was one of the last to escape containment and had to leave her mother behind. Twenty-five years later, Maj. Eden Sinclair (Rhona Mitra) leads a team back into the hot zone to find a counteragent to the virus, which has re-emerged in London. She and her comrades wage a desperate battle for survival against feral survivors, as they try to prevent it from ushering in a new dark age.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: A teenage assassin (Saoirse Ronan) faces startling revelations about her existence and questions about her humanity as she makes her way across Europe to carry out a hit.","large":"Raised by her father (Eric Bana) in the Finnish wilderness, teenage Hanna (Saoirse Ronan) has trained all her life to be the perfect assassin. Her father sends her on a mission, and she stealthily makes her way across Europe while evading agents sent after her by a ruthless operative named Marissa (Cate Blanchett), who once worked with Hanna's father. As she draws closer to her target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and begins to question her humanity.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: A band of samurai sets out to avenge the death and dishonor of their master at the hands of a ruthless shogun.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: A woman helps an amnesiac, who has a dangerous past, to dodge assassins as he tries to learn about himself.","large":"A man, salvaged, near death, from the ocean by an Italian fishing boat. When he recuperates, the man suffers from total amnesia, without identity or background, except for a range of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistic skills and self-defense that speak of a dangerous past. He sets out on a desperate search-assisted by the initially rebellious Marie, to discover who he really is, and why he's being lethally pursued by assassins.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: A CIA chief sends a senior operative to take down Jason Bourne when it appears the rogue agent is behind the deaths of two people.","large":"Jason Bourne is living in India when he is framed by Russian agent Kirill for the theft of millions from the CIA; Kirill begins to pursue Bourne, intending to assassinate him -- but while Bourne and his girlfriend, Marie, are on the run, a shot meant for him kills her instead; vowing revenge, Bourne sets out to prove his innocence and bring the culprits to justice, but he has to evade CIA head Pamela Landy, who is convinced he is guilty.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne dodges a ruthless C.I.A. official and his Agents from a new assassination program while searching for the origins of his life as a trained killer.","large":"Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) continues his international quest to uncover his true identity. From Russia to Europe to northern Africa to the United States, he must stay one step ahead of those who would capture or kill him before he has a chance to discover the truth.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: The actions of Jason Bourne spell the possible end of secret intelligence programs, so a specially enhanced operative (Jeremy Renner) goes on the run with a research scientist (Rachel Weisz) when it appears that their lives will become forfeit.","large":"When the actions of Jason Bourne spark a fire that threatens to burn down decades of research across a number of secret intelligence agencies, Eric Byer (Edward Norton), the man who built the programs, decides he must sacrifice one of them: Outcome. Aaron Cross (Jeremy Renner), one of Outcome's six agents, and research scientist Marta Shearing (Rachel Weisz) go on the run when Byer targets them for termination. But Cross proves to be a far deadlier target than Byer realizes.

programme.desc: Apaches hold a Wells Fargo agent's daughter ransom for a jailed brave.

programme.desc: A bullet offers a clue to a murder.

programme.desc: An evil family rules a town with guns.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie searches for Eli Fisher, but first must deal with the man who's been trailing him -- and who's also searching for Fisher.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: While in search of a thief called The Utah Kid, Jim learns that his quarry has been hanged in a small town -- but the crook's stolen cash remains missing.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie suspects that a paroled man -- who is working as an eccentric frontier dentist -- may have something to do with a murdered stage driver.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie guards a stagecoach carrying gold.

programme.desc: Jim investigates killing during robbery.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: The son of a dead man accused of a stage coach robbery finds an empty strongbox in the attic and hopes that Jim Hardie can help him uncover the real thieves.

programme.desc: Hardie tries to prevent a lynching when a town's hard cases accuse a Basque sheepherder of the abduction of a young girl.

programme.desc: Jim goes undercover as a trainee for Wells Fargo, to try and find out who is supplying renegade Indians with the guns they are using on their murderous raids.

programme.desc: Hardie isn't pleased when a man and beautiful woman insist on becoming passengers on the stagecoach he will use.

programme.desc: Jim Hardie is ordered to infiltrate Sam Bass' gang so that he can learn where they hole up between raids.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie is called in to investigate what happened to a long overdue stagecoach; among passengers were the son of a wealthy rancher and his fiancée.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie joins a group of passengers aboard a stagecoach that includes a woman and her son, a reporter and an outlaw.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: When Jesse James and his gang are suspected of robbing a bank in Missouri, Jim Hardie goes undercover to try to find the outlaw.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Outlaw Belle Starr and her gang rob a train on which Jim Hardie is a passenger, and he tries to lure her from hiding by tempting her with a prominent racehorse.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A rookie outlaw holds up the stage carrying cash that Jim is waiting for, prompting Jim to go off looking for the thief, but he finds he needs the criminal's help when the two must evade an Indian attack.

programme.desc: Feelings run high when a passenger on the wagon train is accused of murdering a young man. Guest star: Ricardo Montalban. With Ward Bond and Robert Horton.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When three robbers meet up with the wagon train, a woman is kidnapped and her husband is badly beaten.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A youth kills a man defending his sister's honor, only to find his faith in her is misplaced.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When the horses on the wagon train suddenly begin dying, Flint is sent to find a doctor and finds himself in a shootout with the man's son-in-law.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A kind stranger traveling with the wagon train manages to prevent an old Indian from being hanged. Guest stars: Mark Stevens and Joanne Dru. With Ward Bond and Robert Horton.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint is sent in search of a gang of robbers who have stolen the wagon train money and deeds to land in California.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A man who has spent years running from his painful past is finally forced to face the fears that haunt him.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An Army lieutenant is determined to have revenge on the Indian tribe responsible for his father's death, despite the fact they now want peace.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A woman finally learns the truth about her son that she hasn't seen in 10 years. Guest star: Agnes Moorehead. With Ward Bond and Robert Horton.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A young married couple is faced with a difficult problem when the husband's first wife, who was presumed dead, joins the wagon train.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Major Adams is forced to come to the rescue of a fast-talking con artist who gets himself into a situation that he can't handle.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Drifter Jess Harper arrives in Laramie searching for a man, but gunfire sends him out into the countryside, where he meets rancher Slim Sherman and his brother, Andy.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck drifter with ties to Jess arrives at the Sherman station with a lady preacher; though Jess tries to avoid the man, events force Jess to become involved.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Martha Chambers takes refuge from vengeful Indians at the Sherman ranch after she kills the son of a Pawnee chief in a moment of blind terror.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Gil Brady seeks out help from his brother-in-law, Jess Harper, when he deserts the calvary and heads for Canada.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Tully Hatch, the man who saved Jess Harper's life and later made him a deputy sheriff, has been accused of robbing a bank and Jess feels he must help him.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: As the only witness to a robbery, Hardie is targeted by the robber's partner.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim goes on the hunt for a band of robbers that is targeting Pony Express riders.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie is sent to negotiate a right of way for their stagecoaches through Sam Brundage's property.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie investigates a stagecoach holdup where white men disguised as Indians kill the driver and the guard and leave a lady for dead.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: At the Wells Fargo auction, a man and a woman bid vigorously on a destroyed suitcase.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie and his Wells Fargo agents set a trap for the notorious Stillwell gang, but the outlaws manage to outwit the detectives and escape with five thousand dollars.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: The Wells Fargo team is tasked with protecting a shipment of jade in San Francisco.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie rides with a bigoted general on a mission to quell a Sioux uprising.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie spends Christmas hunting for gunrunners moving weapons across the Mexican border.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: An old friend of Jim Hardie's is killed in a Wells Fargo express office robbery.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie tries to find a prisoner's hidden loot.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim protects a woman who is a material witness in a San Francisco corruption investigation.

programme.desc: A young man helps Jim investigate.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie attempts to break up a gang of outlaws that steals buffalo hides.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: When Wells Fargo is accused of stealing high-grade gold ore from mine wagons and then a new Wells Fargo investigator dies in a mine, Hardie must investigate.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Wanted outlaw Bill Longley and Jim Hardie join forces to retrieve money stolen from Wells Fargo by another outlaw.

programme.title: Wagon Train

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A young man who is determined to avoid becoming a henpecked husband must weigh his love for an overbearing woman.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An old friend of Adams and McCullough joins the wagon train and shares the fact that he has recently discovered a gold mine in the nearby hills.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A riverboat gambler who has committed murder pretends to be a parson traveling with his children. With Ward Bond and Robert Horton.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A man returns from the Civil War to find his home and family destroyed as the result of a feud and heads West to seek his revenge.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An old Indian asks to join the wagon train, so his son can learn the ways of the white man because he believes the Indian way of life is dying.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Major Adams intervenes when a friend's niece becomes romantically involved with a gambler. Guest star: Cesar Romero. With Ward Bond and Robert Horton.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint finds the ruins of a farmhouse which was attacked by Indians using guns, not arrows; he later finds the gunrunner who supplied them.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When a group of Scottish people join the wagon train as a protection against Indian attacks, two disparate young people fall in love.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An American Indian, his wife and baby join the wagon train when Major Adams discovers him badly beaten by bigoted white settlers.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A young Indian kidnaps his father's fiancé and forces her to work as revenge against the man who treated his mother badly and caused her suicide.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A man searches for hidden gold.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess takes on an undercover job for the sheriff, acting as a guide for an outlaw who's searching for money stolen in an earlier robbery.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess capture an outlaw and his partner, but find the tables turned when the outlaw's gang breaks the pair out of jail during the trial.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Townsfolk are worried when a known hired killer arrives in Laramie and asks for directions to the Sherman ranch.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A beautiful but greedy rancher's wife turns to old friend Jess for help in leaving her rich husband, but her husband has sent bounty hunters after her.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim's old war buddy arrives on the stage, ostensibly for a visit, but his real intent is to assassinate General Sherman.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess is livid when his innocent friend is tried, convicted and hanged for the murders of Doc Webb and Sheriff Kiley.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie enlists the aid of a criminal to find the outlaws who kidnapped a U.S. senator, offering the man parole and a reward for his help.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie investigates the disappearance of a Wells Fargo agent sent to stake a claim in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: An outlaw gang abducts Jim, who's guarding a payroll, and uses Jim's ID to rob the local Wells Fargo safe.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Following his capture by Hardie, the notorious Johnny Ringo asks to care for his dying sister.

programme.desc: Plot. Chhoti Si Baat is a romantic comedy about a painfully shy young man Arun Pradeep (Amol Palekar), who lacks self-confidence and fails to stand up for his convictions, in the process letting all and sundry walk all over him.

programme.desc: Ravi, the eldest of seven orphaned brothers, living in a farmhouse, marries Indu, a nurse. However, the brothers and their sister-in-law struggle to adjust with each other.

programme.desc: It's is a romantic drama about Cheenu, a young man who initially pretends to fall in love with Maya as part of a challenge. However, he eventually falls for her for real, and they must overcome family obstacles to be together.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: A blind man Pyare and his deaf friend Mohan fall in love with twin sisters Preeti and Priya. But their relationships spiral into chaos when the sisters get falsely implicated in a murder case and the men have to find a way to save them.

programme.title: Shor In The City
programme.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.

programme.title: Ek Thi Daayan
programme.desc: A supernatural thriller that tells the story of a magician haunted by a childhood memory of encountering a witch. When he falls in love with a woman who resembles the witch, he must confront his fears and uncover the truth about her identity. The film explores themes of superstition, fear, and the power of the mind in a spine-tingling and suspenseful plot.
